# Hogan Pools

Hogan Pools designs and builds custom gunite pools for homeowners in St. Louis, Ballwin, and nearby Missouri communities.

## Site map
- [Custom Pool Builders in St. Louis, MO | Hogan Pools](https://www.hoganpools.com/)

- [Custom Pool Construction Process | St. Louis, MO | Hogan Pools](https://www.hoganpools.com/our-process/)

### Custom Pool Construction Process | St. Louis, MO | Hogan Pools
URL: https://www.hoganpools.com/our-process/
Description: See how Hogan Pools designs and builds custom gunite pools for St. Louis and Ballwin homeowners, from consultation and excavation to startup and care.
Text:
Our Process From consultation to startup, St. Louis-area homeowners always know what comes next. How we build custom gunite pools, step by step 1 Consultation & Design We listen to your ideas, design a pool that fits your landscape, and handle permitting before we break ground. The journey to your dream pool starts with a detailed consultation where we listen to your ideas, needs, and vision. Our team works closely with you to design a pool that complements your landscape and adheres to local regulations. Once we finalize the design, we’ll take care of securing the required permits and approvals to begin construction. 2 Excavation We excavate precisely to your design dimensions to establish a stable, aligned foundation. Next, we use heavy machinery to excavate the pool area, carefully following the dimensions from the design. This step creates a solid foundation for your pool, ensuring everything is perfectly aligned for a structurally sound result. 3 Reinforcement & Plumbing Steel rebar strengthens the shell while plumbing and circulation are positioned for long-term performance. We then install a steel rebar framework to reinforce the pool structure. This provides stability and supports the gunite application. During this phase, we also install the plumbing system for water circulation and filtration to keep your pool running smoothly. 4 Applying Gunite We spray the durable gunite shell and shape the pool to match your custom features. Gunite, a durable blend of cement, sand, and water, is sprayed to form the pool shell. This versatile material can be shaped to suit any design, allowing for creative features and personalized touches in your pool. 5 Filling the Pool We fill, balance, and test every system so the pool is safe and ready for swimming. After construction is complete, we fill the pool with water and balance the chemicals to make certain it’s safe and ready for use. Our team conducts thorough testing to verify that all systems are functioning properly. After a brief settling period, your new pool is ready to transform your backyard. 6 Ongoing Care We guide you on maintenance rhythms that keep water clear and the structure protected. To keep your pool in pristine condition, regular maintenance is essential. Gunite pools require consistent care to prevent algae buildup and maintain clear, clean water. With regular cleaning, chemical checks, and professional servicing, your pool will continue to bring joy and relaxation for many years to come. Pool Replastering Services With Hogan Pools, replastering your pool has never been easier. Our team is trained at Watershape University and follows National Plasterers Council (NPC) best practices, including proper fill procedures, careful start-up, and water-balance guidance. The result is a finish that cures evenly for a smoother surface, better color, and longer-lasting performance for St. Louis-area homeowners. See It In Action Watch a real Hogan Pools build—from excavation day to first fill—with the same communication and cleanliness we bring to every backyard. Clear milestone updates before each phase begins On-site lead verifying layout, depth, and plumbing daily Protective barriers and daily cleanups to keep your yard safe Inspections on steel, plumbing pressure, and gunite curing Final equipment check and homeowner walkthrough before finish Water balancing guidance so you start with crystal clarity Ready to start your St. Louis pool project? 📞 Contact Us

- [About Hogan Pools | St. Louis, MO | Custom Gunite Pools](https://www.hoganpools.com/about-us/)

### About Hogan Pools | St. Louis, MO | Custom Gunite Pools
URL: https://www.hoganpools.com/about-us/
Description: Meet the family-owned St. Louis pool builder behind Hogan Pools, serving Ballwin and nearby Missouri communities with three generations of craftsmanship.
Text:
About Hogan Pools Family-owned custom pool builders with three generations of experience dating back to 1976. Three generations. One standard of quality. Owner Anthony George brings 20 years of pool construction experience to every project. After 12 years with established pool companies, he founded Hogan Pools and has led the company since 2018. Our roots go back to 1976, when Anthony’s grandfather began building pools. Today, Anthony’s father contributes 40+ years of hands-on expertise, helping ensure each project reflects proven craftsmanship and lasting quality. From design collaboration and site preparation to structural, mechanical, and finish systems, we manage each phase with modern methods, quality materials, and the clear communication homeowners need from start to finish. Ready to plan your pool? Explore completed Hogan Pools projects throughout the St. Louis area. View Pool Gallery

- [Pool Financing in St. Louis, MO | Hogan Pools](https://www.hoganpools.com/financing/)

### Pool Financing in St. Louis, MO | Hogan Pools
URL: https://www.hoganpools.com/financing/
Description: Explore financing options for custom gunite pools in St. Louis, Ballwin, and nearby Missouri communities, then talk with Hogan Pools about scope and budget.
Text:
Pool Financing Options in St. Louis, Missouri Flexible financing can help qualified St. Louis-area homeowners spread pool project costs into manageable monthly payments. Explore estimates first—then call us when you’re ready to talk scope and budget. A custom pool is a long-term investment in your home and lifestyle. Financing can help you move forward sooner while keeping your cash flow predictable. Use the estimator below to review possible payment ranges. Terms and approvals vary based on the lender and your application. Recent St. Louis-area project build — ask us what’s possible for your space. Fast estimates Get a quick sense of monthly payments before committing to a full design. Budget-friendly planning Align features and scope with a payment range that feels comfortable. Talk to a human We’ll help you match your priorities to a realistic build plan and timeline. Financing FAQs Does exploring options obligate me to start a project? No. You can review estimates first and contact us when you’re ready to discuss design and pricing. What can be financed? Most project costs may be eligible, including the pool, hardscape, and related improvements (varies by lender). How do I get an accurate monthly payment? Monthly payments depend on the approved amount, term length, and rate. Use the estimator, then we’ll confirm numbers once your scope is defined. Estimate payments and view available offers. Financing is offered through third-party providers. Approval, rates, and terms vary. Pentair Pool offers & rebates — trade up and save. Promotions provided by Pentair. Terms and availability may vary; visit the provider for details. Ready to explore pool financing in St. Louis? Call us to discuss your project and budget.

URL: https://www.hoganpools.com/careers/
Description: Apply for pool construction and support roles with Hogan Pools, a family-owned pool builder serving Ballwin, St. Louis, and nearby Missouri communities.
Text:
Careers at Hogan Pools Build custom pools for homeowners across Ballwin, St. Louis, and nearby Missouri communities. Why Join Our St. Louis-Area Team We’re a growing, family-run pool builder serving St. Louis and surrounding communities. Our team is known for high standards, clear communication, and doing the job right the first time. If you enjoy hands-on work, problem solving, and helping homeowners bring their vision to life, we’d love to hear from you. Typical Openings Pool construction crew members Equipment and plumbing installers Tile, coping, and finish specialists Project coordination and field support Apply Today Send your resume and a short note about your experience. Email Your Application
